'''Xucaabo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who worked for [[Sebolto]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was also employed by the [[Pixelito Puppeteers Union]], and was a skilled and well-known puppeteer. A [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on his head by the [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], [[Ask Aak/Legends|Ask Aak]], for falling heavily on debt. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the bounty, worth 3,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for a live capture, and three thousand for deceased delivery, was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].
